author: Chris McClendon
name: Depth Recurrence + Legal Score-First TTT (10L int5/int6)
blurb: 10-layer GPT with depth-recurrence infrastructure, BigramHash(10240), SmearGate, XSA, U-Net skips, mixed int5/int6 quantization, SWA, Late QAT, and competition-legal score-first TTT (AdamW, chunked score-then-train). Trained on 4xA100.
